sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id UInt32, haystack String, needle String) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT ngramDistance(haystack, needle) AS similarity, id FROM test_strings WHERE similarity < 0.5;
SELECT h.id, h.haystack, n.needle, ngramDistance(h.haystack, n.needle) AS distance FROM test_strings h JOIN test_strings n ON h.id != n.id WHERE ngramDistance(h.haystack, n.needle) < 0.1;
SELECT id, ngramDistance(haystack, needle) + INTERVAL 1 HOUR AS adjusted_similarity FROM test_strings WHERE adjusted_similarity < 1;
SELECT id, haystack FROM test_strings WHERE ngramDistance(haystack, needle) = (SELECT MIN(ngramDistance(haystack, needle)) FROM test_strings);
SELECT id, now() + INTERVAL ngramDistance(haystack, needle) DAY AS date_adjusted FROM test_strings;
CREATE TABLE temp_results AS SELECT ngramDistance(haystack, needle) AS sim FROM test_strings WHERE length(haystack) > 0;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_count, AVG(ngramDistance('ClickHouse', haystack)) AS average_distance FROM test_strings GROUP BY haystack HAVING average_distance > 0.5;
SELECT DISTINCT id, ngramDistance(haystack, needle) OVER (PARTITION BY haystack ORDER BY needle DESC) AS partitioned_distance FROM test_strings WHERE haystack IS NOT NULL;
